holdings.infoBox: VGRO is an equity ETF with a total of 25 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 15.21%, Apple at 9.61%, Alphabet at 9.43%, Microsoft at 7.62%, and Amazon.com at 7.04%.

overview.description: The Virtus Silvant Growth Opportunities ETF (VGRO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, utilizing bottom-up fundamental research analysis to identify US large-cap companies the issuer believes provide the best potential of secular and cyclical growth stocks. VGRO was launched on Dec 23, 2025 and is issued by Virtus Investment Partners.
